programme.desc: Two dangerous killers break out of one of New York’s toughest prisons. Convicted murderers Richard Matt and David Sweat cut through steel walls, crawl through steampipes and get their way through a maze of tunnels on their way to freedom.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Escape From Dannemora: Getaway Car (Part 2)
programme.desc: The manhunt for escaped prisoners Richard Matt and David Sweat was growing, expanding from the United States to Canada. Thousands of leads were being followed, but weeks into the search, there was still no sign of the missing men.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2
programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Bernie Madoff: Who Else Knew? (Part 2)

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Bernie Madoff: Most Hated Man (Part 1)

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Copper Scroll

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Redemption Road
programme.desc: AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. Starvation sets in causing tension to rise. They'll have to come together to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Melt Down Under
programme.desc: A Swedish adventure guide and a Texas military vet take on Australia's Outback, where almost nothing can survive. Dry windstorms, freezing temperatures, lack of sleep and cultural differences.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Mic Drop Pop!
programme.desc: Josh has a large knot on his head resulting from a car crash from 18 years ago. Brittney is covered in mysterious bumps. TJ has a hard, curious lump protruding from his side. Luis has a bump on his shoulder and his daughters fear it's dangerous.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Losing Half Myself
programme.desc: Phyllis and Patty aren't just identical twins, they're identical twin hoarders. They've transformed every home in which they've ever lived into a complete disaster area.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Gonna Die in Here
programme.desc: Once a respected high school principal, Wayne's life changed when he was the target of a thwarted school shooting. Now paralyzed by PTSD and compulsive hoarding, Wayne has virtually barricaded himself inside his home and in turn has abandoned his family.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Somewhere in My Pile
programme.desc: Beverly's clutter fills every last square inch of her home. Upstairs, her three beloved dogs have made the space absolutely unlivable. With the threat of the city condemning her home, Beverly must clear the hoard or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day

programme.desc: When the kids go to a Halloween party at a haunted campground were a number of murders were once committed, Madea, Bam and Hattie set out to bring them home before anything bad can happen to them, but a chainsaw-wielding killer gets there before they do.

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Boo 2! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: When the kids go to a Halloween party at a haunted campground were a number of murders were once committed, Madea, Bam and Hattie set out to bring them home before anything bad can happen to them, but a chainsaw-wielding killer gets there before they do.

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: A New York City banker puts his family into a witness protection program at his aunt's home when he is set up as the instigator of his company's fraudulent scheme.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash
programme.desc: During a trip to Miami, a major department store makes an offer to buy Dash that leads to Kim, Kourtney, and Khloé arguing about the store's future. Later, Kourtney struggles to enjoy herself around Scott and Khloé keeps her new relationship from Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Winners Take All
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe think old flames are brewing between Kourtney and Scott and take it upon themselves to set them up on a romantic date. The Kardashian girls challenge the Jenners to an obstacle course. Kris and Corey agree to abstain from sex.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: A Tuscan Feast: Joel McHale and Cheryl Hines
programme.desc: Lisa creates an al fresco Tuscan feast for two hilarious guests: Italian-born Joel McHale and actress Cheryl Hines. The day includes a mystery blindfold game, flaming cheese pasta, and Lisa confronting Joel about things he's said about her in the past.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Diva Tea: Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel
programme.desc: Lisa throws a proper English Tea with some very improper conversation as Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel share tales of red carpet underwear fails, one-night stands, and a famous baby daddy!

programme.title: Movie: The Waterboy
programme.desc: A waterboy becomes a football sensation when a coach discovers his talent.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Waterboy
programme.desc: A waterboy becomes a football sensation when a coach discovers his talent.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: $12 Meal Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri pushes the culinary limits of four Flavortown rookies by challenging them to cook a day's worth of meals with a budget of just $12 for each round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Carnival Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four carnival food-loving chefs to play carnival classics, Grocery Games-style. First, he turns a popular strength test game into a finesse challenge to determine which ingredient the chefs must feature in their classic carnival treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy dives into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix a funky joint stacks up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. In Boulder a pizza place loads up the pies with their meatball grinder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ocean Coasts and Great Lakes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from coast to coast and to the Great Lakes to dig up some dynamite dishes. In Los Angeles, a Mexican joint in Grand Central Market serves outrageous octopus tostadas and puts a lights-out spin on a burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos, Turtles and Tri-Tip
programme.desc: Guy tries pork belly tacos and carne adovada in a high-energy marketplace.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Typical Joints
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going off the beaten path to check out some funky finds. In Charlotte, N.C., an eatery tucked inside a beer store slings crazy waffle creations. In Houston, a not-your-everyday fusion joint mashes up killer barbecue with sushi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Day Dining
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy gets a taste of every meal. In Long Beach, California, he's served some delicious short ribs.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Chop Chop
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister, Beth, love cooking competition shows so they decide to hold one in their own kitchen in this new episode. Beth puts together a mystery basket for Trisha, who uses the ingredients to make an appetizer, main course and dessert.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Bringin' Home The Farm
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister head out to a local farm to enjoy its bounty of fresh ingredients.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Say Hello To The Flavors Of Spring
programme.desc: Valerie prepares a meal of spring delights for her husband and friends.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All the Colors of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is celebrating spring's colourful bounty by creating a visual feast that delights the senses and her guest, The Kitchen's Katie Lee. The menu includes golden raspberry goat cheese crostini, roasted rainbow carrots, and more.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Spring is Sprung
programme.desc: It's springtime and Ree's cooking up seasonal Glazed Baked Ham for a Sunday brunch. To wrap up a day's spring cleaning, there's fabulous Fried Chicken and a brilliant bonfire.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Entertaining
programme.desc: Ree hosts a cooking and eating get-together with her Oklahoma City Thunder friends. The menu includes white spinach artichoke lasagna and a butternut kale salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Spring Potluck Faves
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making spring favorites to share at her church potluck. She starts with get-ahead glazed pineapple ham slices and tosses a primavera pasta salad with lemon and parmesan dressing. Her caramelized onion dip is a crowd pleaser.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Crazy 8's
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and the kids serve up some awesome eats with just 8 ingredients. There's a colorful clementine sprinkle cake, a creamy and crunchy easy chicken tot pie, cheesy stuffed pasta and a shortcut speedy dumpling soup.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Mom
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes some easy Midwest staples to keep everyone going on the farm. She starts with carrot cake baked oatmeal and then makes a French fry-covered busy day hotdish, pea and bacon salad with French dressing and rocky road fudge for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Feast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a delicious farm spread to celebrate the arrival of spring with her family. She's making homemade herbed pasta with feta, lemon and pine nuts, hearty meatballs with garlic yogurt and chimichurri, and spring apple and fennel salad.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown cooks up a fresh veggie and herb-inspired meal that includes Veggie soul rolls stuffed with collard greens, carrots, cabbage and rice. Plus, Kardea grills lamb chops with a mint pesto and makes a no-bake Carolina mud pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Springtime in Nashville
programme.desc: Trisha prepares a spring feast that makes use of fresh produce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes by Request
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are taking requests for easy, new and creative recipes, starting with easy smothered chicken and grilled red curry lamb chops. There's also a perfect chocolate cake with easy chocolate frosting.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The four remaining teams pan for gold to earn their seed money, and some teams gain a clear head start on shopping and selling. Meanwhile, extreme cold and winds continue to challenge everyone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: The Boondocks: Pretty Boy Flizzy
programme.desc: R&B singer and bad boy 'Pretty Boy Flizzy' comes to town and is arrested for armed robbery. Tom agrees to be Flizzy's lawyer in exchange for relationship advice. But Flizzy's guidance might have too harsh of a beat.

programme.title: The Boondocks: Good Times
programme.desc: Granddad owes millions of dollars on his house to Eddie Wuncler, son of Ed Wuncler, who has some unique ideas of how Granddad can pay him back. And with Eddie appearing more like a gangster than a businessman, times are about to get worse.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Teen Titans Go Classic Easter Holiday Special
programme.desc: The Easter Bunny is missing, and it's up to the Titans to find him before Easter is ruined.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Easter Creeps
programme.desc: It's Easter, and the Tooth Fairy is trying to take over the holiday.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Booty Eggs
programme.desc: Not wanting to be creeped out on Easter the Titans dispatch the Easter Bunny and take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Robin still regrets not being able to find an Easter egg when he was a kid, so the Titans head to Gotham to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Power Moves/ Staring at the Future
programme.desc: Robin gets carried away when he and Cyborg start merging their powers and technology; Cyborg and Beast Boy have a staring contest that lasts 30 years.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: No Power/ Sidekick
programme.desc: Feeling the other Titans depend too much on their super powers, Robin challenges them to go 24 hours without using their powers; Robin gets called to the Batcave, but it is only to be a house sitter while Batman is away.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Caged Tiger/ Nose Mouth
programme.desc: After the boys get back from their 'bro-cation' they get stuck in the elevator together. Raven starts using her powers around the Tower more with some pressure from the other Titans. However the more she used the more evil she gets.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Legs/ Breakfast Cheese
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Birds/ Be Mine
programme.desc: Beast Boy is convinced that Terra is his girlfriend, when she is just using him to access the Titans' secrets, and only Raven suspects her.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Brain Food/ In and Out
programme.desc: The Titans want to be the scariest trick-or-treaters in town, so Raven casts a spell to turn them into real monsters.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Sour Candy Trials
programme.desc: Craig goes on a mind-bending journey as he tries to eat the most sour candy in the Creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Kelsey the Author
programme.desc: Craig and Stacks help Kelsey become a real author turning her story into a book!

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Council of the Creek
programme.desc: The circle game wreaks havoc on the Creek, so Craig forms a council to restore order.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Cousin of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig takes his cousin, Bryson, to the Creek, and accidentally starts a water balloon war.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Sparkle Cadet
programme.desc: Craig, Kelsey and JP team up with an intergalactic hero named Sparkle Cadet, hoping to save the Creek from negativity.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Creek Daycare
programme.desc: When Jessica refuses to go grass sledding with Craig and his friends, he takes her to the Creek Daycare. The daycare's owner steps out to help a child, leaving Jessica and the Stump Kids to look after the tiny tots.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Stink Bomb
programme.desc: The kids must evacuate the Creek due to an accidental stink bomb, and Craig takes it upon himself to rescue those stuck in the stench.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Sugar Smugglers
programme.desc: Follow Craig as he leads his best friends on comical journeys by their neighborhood creek.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Test
programme.desc: Gumball is livid when an online test keeps telling him that his character-type is 'The Loser.' He’s convinced the only way to shake off this label is to do the opposite of everything he normally would.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ollie
programme.desc: When Darwin asks Gumball to teach him how to skate, Gumball makes sure he covers every aspect of the skating lifestyle from wearing the right gear, using the right terms and choosing the right board.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Slide
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Rocky find love on a dating app.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish
programme.desc: Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, so Gumball and Darwin, feeling bad, create one called Muriel. Granny Jojo finds out that Louie has been spending time online with 'another woman' and sets out to destroy her, despite her not being real.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Loophole
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin give Bobert instructions on how to behave properly, Bobert applies his own logic to the rules.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: Gumball can't accept that he's the only student without special powers. He becomes Hector’s mom's apprentice and she quickly learns that it's not wise to leave Gumball unsupervised around magic.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Vase

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Copycats

programme.desc: When Vic and Val accidently turn themselves and Don into babies, they must escape a daycare center in order to change back to their normal ages.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Balloon Boys
programme.desc: Vic and Val go on a hot air balloon trip with Sal and compete to be his favorite, but things go awry when they try to use the magical Nazca Lines to their advantage.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: The Great Bongo Heist

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move
programme.desc: A trio of rare Dhole canines are prepared to make their cross-country journey to the zoo, and keepers anxiously await their arrival. A tinamou chick must be hand-reared, while a specialized tool is welded to extract a tusk from a charming Babirusa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.desc: At the clinic, a mutt called Marley is wreaking havoc at home and her owners are in desperate need of conquering the chaos. Later, Dr. Gavin handles a smelly shih-tzu, and animal behaviourist Caroline meets a very demanding duck called Charlie.

programme.title: Embarrassing Pets: Paw Problems
programme.desc: At the clinic, owners of an outspoken shih-tzu is in need of dog behaviorist Leon's help to conquer his incessant barking. Later, Dr. Gavin helps a very pesky parrot with this attitude problem, and Dr. Deepti helps a Bichon Frise's itchy paw problem.

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue
programme.desc: A trio of abandoned puma cubs arrives at the zoo, while the staff grows concerned that Ella, the oldest rhino, is not acting herself. Meanwhile, a Caribbean flamingo is born at the zoo after nearly two decades, and Otto the stallion makes his debut.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out
programme.desc: When an out of state hunter appears to be lying about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate. Conservation Officers work with volunteers to recover the body of a missing hiker on Mt. Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Backseat Bear
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre and Arsenault confront a bear that has made its winter den in a car. Officer McKee investigates a claim that an illegal deer kill was an accident. Lt. Boudreau stops a family of snowmobilers riding illegally on a highway.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stubborn as a Moose
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski attempts every trick in the book to wrangle a stubborn moose off of a busy roadway. Officer Canfield plays a game of cat and mouse with a suspected illegal deer hunter, and Officer McKee and Demler investigate an illegal turkey kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course
programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen who are breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a jet ski collision leads to arguments, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Pelicans and Poachers
programme.desc: On the Gulf, oyster boats and fish retailers are inspected. Outside San Antonio, a poacher is caught after posting pictures. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps and help a pelican in distress.

programme.title: Movie: Life
programme.desc: Prisoners at Mississippi's Parchman Farm reminisce about two inmates who were framed by a corrupt sheriff years ago for a murder they didn't commit. The odd duo spent 65 years together, squabbling and trying to escape their confines to no avail.

programme.desc: In order to get next to a computer expert whose new discovery may place national security at risk, Malcolm Turner must once again impersonate his grandmother. He poses as the hacker's nanny, but things get complicated when he gets close to the family.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: A Tale of Two Cories
programme.desc: A single dad and his daughter want to build a dream home and gain a sense of stability after renting for over a decade. The daughter is obsessed with the colour blue, so Mika must find a way to incorporate it into the design.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Bringing Home Baby
programme.desc: A couple is ready to move out of his parent's home and start a new life with their baby right next door. Building on sentimental property is an exciting task for Brian and Mika, but first they'll have to clear a lot filled with decades of collectibles.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Dream Home for a Globetrotter
programme.desc: A Harlem Globetrotter is ready to settle down with his girlfriend in their dream home. With their California house rented out and only a short amount of video chatting, Brian and Mika have their work cut out to finish this big-deal build in just 100 days.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Key West Compromise
programme.desc: A couple calls on Brian and Mika to build a custom home on a gorgeous, lakefront lot. Brian and Mika are challenged to combine his desire for a fun, Key West, FL, paradise with her dream of a peaceful cottage oasis.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Seventh Time's the Charm
programme.desc: A family of four has lived in six homes over the past 10 years while trying to find their perfect fit. Brian and Mika help them build a home that they think is just right, but when their plans fall through, they'll have to double down to not disappoint.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Brian and Mika Dream Big
programme.desc: After building for hundreds of clients, Brian and Mika are ready for their own dream home, but agreeing on a style is proving to be a challenge! They'll have to compromise to create a home that reveals their personalities and makes the whole family happy.

programme.title: Home Town: The Cafe House
programme.desc: With an all in budget under $250k, Ben and Erin are able to give the Bell brothers a functioning cafe kitchen, beautiful cafe dining rooms, and an incredibly efficient apartment for Connor.

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Home Town: Bachelor's Paradise
programme.desc: After years of travelling, a bachelor is ready to buy a home where his family has lived for five generations. Ben and Erin find a cottage with good resale potential, and their design includes a stunning master bedroom and a quaint front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: The Move of a Lifetime

programme.title: Movie: Stalker in the Attic

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Matrimony

programme.title: Movie: Infidelity in Suburbia
programme.desc: A woman begins an affair with her hot private contractor but wracked with guilt, ends the relationship. His cravings for her run darker than she imagines. He builds a special room in her basement to hide the object of his desire, and his rage.

programme.title: Movie: A Murder to Remember

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Tour of Fright
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Unnatural World
programme.desc: From a Nebraska road where a farmer hung his entire family to an Upstate New York farmhouse where a demon has long overstayed its welcome, we explore locations linked to unnerving and terrifying tales.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Devil's Playground
programme.desc: From a Nevada motel centered around clowns and haunted by a 1911 tragedy to a Maine movie theater where the horror lurks in the aisles and not on the screen, we explore scary attractions across the nation.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: A Bad Moms Christmas
programme.desc: Sick of the Christmas chaos, three moms decide to celebrate the holiday in a much more low-key and less stressful fashion this year, but their plans are disrupted when their respective mothers all unexpectedly decide to spend the holiday with them.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days

programme.title: Movie: A Bad Moms Christmas
programme.desc: Sick of the Christmas chaos, three moms decide to celebrate the holiday in a much more low-key and less stressful fashion this year, but their plans are disrupted when their respective mothers all unexpectedly decide to spend the holiday with them.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: Jingle Bells and Prison Cells
programme.desc: Melissa breaks ground on her boutique 'Envy' despite Joe's desire to keep her at home. Jacqueline catches up with friends on facelifts and finances. Finally, after nearly a year in prison, Teresa returns home to her family in time for Christmas.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: A Very Hairy Christmas
programme.desc: Melissa hosts the Gorga/ Giudice Christmas Eve dinner and reunites with Teresa for the first time in a year. Later, Jacqueline gets a call from Teresa as Dolores attempts to negotiate peace between the two ex-BFFs. Joe and Gia are at odds over NYE plans.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Sour Grapes
programme.desc: Brandi’s birthday trip to Grapevine continues as D’Andra and Kary spar over their fractured friendship, while Kary accuses Tiffany of being a hypocrite.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Another One Bites the Crust
programme.desc: Tiffany throws an intimate pizza party in an attempt to get closer to the other women, but her obsession with rules and an ill-timed prank only push them further away. Stephanie goes over-budget on her first charity project.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Getting Weird in Austin
programme.desc: Tiffany finds out that her pizza party left a bad taste in everyone’s mouth, and worries about her upcoming meeting to reduce her work hours. The ladies hit the road on a rock & roll tour bus to spend the weekend at a fabulous estate in Austin.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Austin, We Have a Problem
programme.desc: In part two of the trip to Austin, D’Andra and Kary finally find common ground, even if it is on the water. Tiffany bonds with Stephanie and Kameron, while Brandi finds herself walking on eggshells around Tiffany.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: The Doctor is Out
programme.desc: Tiffany leaves Austin without telling anyone after an altercation with Brandi. Stephanie shares her own mental health journey with Kary's daughter Olivia, Momma Dee weighs in on the shenanigans in Austin.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: A Simmons By Any Other Name
programme.desc: D’Andra’s Medicine Monday leaves Brandi feeling like she betrayed her religious beliefs. Tiffany has a big meeting with her boss to reduce her work hours, while Kameron lays down the law with Court about their house hunting.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Mommy Dearests
programme.desc: D'Andra makes amends to Momma Dee on the heels of their epic fight, while Kary bonds with her daughters on a hike and Stephanie unveils her first locker room project for charity.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: RV Having Fun Yet?
programme.desc: Tiffany seeks guidance from Momma Dee after a stilted encounter with her own mother, while Court gives Kameron the surprise of a lifetime. Stephanie plans a trip to Oklahoma, but her efforts are in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Welcome One, Welcome Atlanta
programme.desc: DeShawn begins the search for the perfect staff to run her mansion while Lisa learns to balance business and motherhood. Sheree plans a party to celebrate her life post-divorce, but problems erupt when NeNe crashes the party fashionably late.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: It's My Party!
programme.desc: The day after Sherée's big birthday blowout, NeNe, still angry about the party, has lunch with her hairdresser, Dwight, who convinces her to take the high road and not waste any time or energy. Meanwhile, Kim is throwing her daughter a birthday party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Who's Your Poppa?
programme.desc: The ladies take a trip to the countryside to meet with Kim's psychic advisor. After an eerie prediction of personal strife ahead, NeNe gets a letter from a family member revealing that the man who she thought was her father might not be.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Bring On the Bling
programme.desc: DeShawn is determined to make a big splash on the Atlantic social scene with her 'Night of a Thousand Stars' gala event, and invites hundreds of people into her private estate for the lavish event. Kim and Sherée bond during a private spa day.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Out of Tune
programme.desc: Sherée and Lisa let loose at a pole dancing class. Lisa, DeShawn, NeNe and their husbands spend a luxurious evening together at a vineyard to celebrate DeShawn's 34th birthday. The dinner takes a turn for the worse after NeNe starts to gossip.

programme.title: Movie: Sing
programme.desc: In order to save his failing theatre, a koala attempts to hold the world's greatest singing competition. A sea of hopefuls arrives, but five lead contestants soon emerge. Each of the animals believes the competition could change their lives.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Viking Hiccup and his dragon's happy lives are disrupted when they meet a female Night Fury that's followed closely by an army determined to enslave all dragons. Hiccup's clan and their dragons set sail to find the safety of a legendary dragon utopia.

programme.title: Movie: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A farmer has a long running feud with a rebellious rabbit named Peter who's determined to have free access to the man's delicious vegetable patch, but their feud reaches new heights when they both take a liking to an animal lover who lives nearby.

programme.title: Jesus: His Life: Judas: The Betrayal

programme.title: Jesus: His Life: Pilate: The Trial
programme.desc: Pontius Pilate, the governor of Judea, must decide what to do about a troublesome preacher named Jesus. Pilate's wife urges him to rethink executing Jesus, due to a prophetic nightmare.

programme.title: Jesus: His Life: Mary Magdalene: The Crucifixion
programme.desc: After witnessing the torment of Jesus' crucifixion alongside his mother and being cured of 'seven demons', Mary Magdalene is the first to see the unthinkable resurrection of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Jesus: His Life: Peter: The Resurrection
programme.desc: After Peter disavows Jesus for the third time, a resurrected Jesus restores a despaired Peter by commanding him to spread the gospel. By taking on the mission, Peter becomes one of the most important of Jesus' disciples.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Chip Dynasties
programme.desc: Herman Lay used cutting-edge sales techniques and packaging technology to take his regional, small-time chips business to a national level. His empire was soon challenged by a rival innovator.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Cola Wars
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a new era of competition began between two major cola brands, leading to the birth of countless iconic soda products and marketing stunts.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Pizza Wars
programme.desc: In the 1950s, two brothers from Wichita turned their restaurant Pizza Hut into a franchise empire. Unchecked growth and a rival in the form of Domino's threatened to derail their plans.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: American Cheese
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, James Kraft and his new cheese innovation challenged thousands of years of tradition. Around the same time, the Pabst brothers introduced a shelf-stable cheese of their own.

programme.title: Movie: Caged
programme.desc: A naïve widow fights to survive the harsh day-to-day life inside a women's prison.

programme.title: Movie: Calamity Jane

programme.title: Movie: Carefree
programme.desc: A psychiatrist unintentionally falls in love with his friend's love interest.

programme.title: Movie: Carol

programme.title: Movie: Cat on a Hot Tin Roof
programme.desc: In this adaptation of Tennessee Williams' play, strained family ties are exposed during a wealthy patriarch's 65th birthday. As a former football hero drowns his sorrows, he is confronted by his alienated wife and his dying father.

programme.title: Movie: Charade
programme.desc: A widow is pursued by several mysterious men who want her murdered husband's fortune.

programme.title: Movie: The Circus
programme.desc: A man accidentally joins the circus and falls in love with a tightrope walker.

programme.title: Movie: Citizen Kane
programme.desc: When a newspaper tycoon dies, a reporter seeks to investigate his life and the meaning of his last dying word.

programme.title: Movie: The Corn Is Green
programme.desc: A dedicated teacher sacrifices everything to send a young miner to Oxford.

programme.title: Movie: Dark Victory
programme.desc: A selfish socialite falls for her doctor after learning that she has a brain tumour.

programme.title: Movie: Days of Wine and Roses
programme.desc: A husband and wife struggle to be free of alcoholism's unrelenting grip.

programme.title: Movie: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: Two convicts, a white racist and an angry black man, escape while chained to each other.

programme.title: Movie: Destination Moon
programme.desc: A former Air Force general and an industrial mogul build a spaceship to go to the moon.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Copycat
programme.desc: When Cat Noir becomes a burglary suspect, Ladybug must prove his innocence. With a copycat version of Cat Noir prowling around Paris, however, Ladybug is hard-pressed to tell the difference between her partner and the imposter.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?
programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Jessie: Kids Don't Wanna Be Shunned
programme.desc: Emma is upset when her friends stand her up for the new girl in school. Meanwhile, Luke has Ravi help him with his project about India for their school's multicultural night.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Timebreaker
programme.desc: After Alix's friends break her father’s priceless watch, she is akumatized into Timebreaker.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Pharaoh
programme.desc: A young historian gets akumatized into the all-powerful Pharaoh. He wants to bring an Ancient Egyptian princess back to life by sacrificing Alya. To save her, Ladybug and Cat Noir must face an army of mummies outside the Louvre!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cousin Jilly/ Gloria's Cafe
programme.desc: Tilly revives 'Cousin Jilly,' an alter-ego she created to entertain Cricket when they were younger. Gloria opens a secret café in the former Big Coffee space without permission.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Chipocalypse Now
programme.desc: Chip Whistler tears down the buildings around the Greens' house to build a new Wholesome Foods store.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Serfs Up-rising

programme.title: Bunk'd: Cramped Champions
programme.desc: The pool at Camp Champion floods the grounds. Barb and her campers are left camp-less.

programme.title: Jessie: Spaced Out

programme.title: Jessie: From the White House to Our House
programme.desc: Zuri befriends Taylor, a military dependent, whose mother is deployed overseas.

programme.title: Jessie: Moby and Scoby

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Grandma-A-Rooney

programme.desc: When Austin decides to date Jimmy Starr's daughter, Kira, Ally volunteers to help him plan the perfect date. However, in doing so, Ally comes to the realization that she has feelings for Austin too.

programme.title: Jessie: Green-Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: Jessie joins a comedy improv class, and Tony goes to embarrassing lengths to prove his love for Jessie. Meanwhile, Ravi recruits Zuri to help him babysit Mrs. Kipling's baby lizards.

programme.title: Jessie: Make New Friends But Hide the Old
programme.desc: Emma's first day of high school starts badly when she clashes with tough transfer student Rosie. The two soon become friends when they realize they have a lot in common. Kenny the Koala winds up in Luke's backpack, and Jessie struggles with Zuri.

programme.title: Jessie: Trashin' Fashion
programme.desc: Emma is excited that her mom is planning a fashion show to showcase her new teen fashion line. Once Emma sees the terrible designs, she becomes conflicted about whether she should give honest reviews on her fashion blog.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway

programme.title: Bluey: Grannies / Yoga Ball / Calypso
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have a question for their Nana; Mum teaches Bingo how to use her bark; Bluey and her friends learn from their teacher, Calypso.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Newsmakers

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Ambush
programme.desc: A dedicated Air Force Captain who had been deployed overseas for long stretches found himself caught in the crossfire of a love triangle at home. Investigators discovered a tale of obsession and passion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Justice for Bonnie
programme.desc: When Bonnie Craig was found dead, police collected DNA but it didn't match anyone in the system. Then, twelve years later, there was a hit but the man was thousands of miles away. Turns out, prosecutors would need more than DNA to convict a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Seattle
programme.desc: Nicole Pietz was a well-liked fitness executive married to the man of her dreams. Then one night, she didn't show up for dinner with her husband and friends.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Bathtub Mystery
programme.desc: She was a beaming bride. It was a haunting death. Sarah and Ryan were newlyweds when she drowned in the bathtub. Did she die of natural causes or was it deliberate? It took three trials to find the truth.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Behind the Locked Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found in her locked apartment with 20-stab wounds. The Medical Examiner classifies her death as murder. But when the M.E. later changes the ruling to suicide, the decision forces her family into the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish

programme.title: Dateline: The Match
programme.desc: A high school girl is nearly beaten to death in her home and goes under hypnosis to identify her attacker.

programme.title: Dateline: The Match
programme.desc: A high school girl is nearly beaten to death in her home and goes under hypnosis to identify her attacker.

programme.title: Dateline: On the Outskirts of Town

programme.title: Dateline: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: A mother is discovered in her home in an apparent death by suicide. Investigators begin interviewing those closest to her and an evil plot emerges.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow

programme.title: Exhumed: Evil Deception/ A Murderer Among Us

programme.title: Snapped: William Dennis
programme.desc: A horrific murder of a young mother on Halloween night sends California investigators on the hunt for a costumed killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Pamela Hupp
programme.desc: A mother is found dead, another woman targeted at home, two mysterious crimes tied together with a shocking common ground. Excessive pride proves to be the downfall of one sinful perpetrator trying to preserve their reputation.

programme.title: Snapped: Sahara Fakhir
programme.desc: When a beloved family man is found brutally murdered in his home, authorities must follow a trail of clues that exposes a strange and unlikely killer guided by gluttonous urges that led to murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Frances Truesdale
programme.desc: The 1988 roadside murder of a man in Virginia sends investigators down a path fraught with doubts and dead ends, until a long-buried secret is unearthed hundreds of miles away revealing decades old secrets.

programme.title: Snapped: Deborah Perna
programme.desc: When a man is found shot to death on a suburban street, a wild investigation commences, featuring a high-speed car chase, dangerous gang members and a twisted murder plot that betrays family loyalties.

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray
programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.desc: The Griffins move to Washington D.C. where Peter is hired as the new White House Press Secretary.

programme.title: Family Guy: Better Off Meg

programme.title: Family Guy: Undergrounded

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. Lisa and the 8th Commandment
programme.desc: Homer gets an illegal cable hook-up and Lisa refuses to watch for fear of losing her soul.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Sells His Soul

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Skeptic
programme.desc: Lisa unearths a skeleton in the meadow where a new mega-mall is being constructed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Tree Grows in Springfield

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: New discoveries from space give experts new clues in the hunt for Jack the Ripper. When a strange object crash-lands in Antarctica, experts speculate it could be an alien visitor.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aztec Alien Mystery
programme.desc: When satellite images reveal spot a strange white substance in the land of the Aztecs, experts investigate the site for extraterrestrial connections; what they find could explain the rise of one of the world's greatest civilizations.

programme.desc: Nail nippers, jade putters, ice ciders, and water skis are made.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: Monster Ship Confidential
programme.desc: Richard Hammond joins the crew of one of the biggest ships on earth, a monster cargo vessel that uses cutting-edge engineering and the latest tech to deliver vital materials on a non-stop 28,000-mile voyage.

programme.title: How It's Made: Patterned Glass Panels, Road Cases, Stop-Frame Animation
programme.desc: Find out how patterned glass panels, road cases and stop-frame animation are created.

programme.desc: Features fire extinguishers, doughnuts, shock absorbers and banjos.

programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Three-Wheel Electric Bikes, Skin Cream, Patio Heaters and Wood-Spoke Wheels
programme.desc: This episode includes 3-wheel electric bikes, skin cream, patio heaters and wood-spoke wheels.

programme.title: How It's Made: Potash, Leather Bracelets, Wild Rice, and Hex Key L Wrenches
programme.desc: This episode features potash, leather bracelets, wild rice, and hex key L wrenches.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust
programme.desc: After her husband dies suddenly, a woman becomes the relentless target of her overly flirtatious neighbor. When her brother moves in to protect her, he's put on a collision course with the neighbor that will only be resolved with bloodshed.

programme.title: Shattered: The House on Hamilton Avenue
programme.desc: In 2006, Officer Mike Kermon is the first to arrive at a house on Hamilton Avenue where neighbors believe shots have been fired. As he enters the quiet home, he has no idea that what he'll find inside will change his life forever.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: American Monster: Life in Florida
programme.desc: Wealthy and glamorous 72-year-old widow Jean Schwarzkopf is determined not to give up on life and is soon a fixture on the Florida social scene. But when Jean's new friends are not all they seem her family is drawn into a dark world of crime and violence.

programme.title: American Monster: Nothing Can Stop Us
programme.desc: Tattoo artist Amber Andrews and snowboarder Brandon Duran have a tumultuous marriage. When love turns to venomous hate, a shocking secret breaks the surface and reveals a betrayal that leads to murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Ghost From the Past
programme.desc: Best friends Julie Marange and Kristin Dargis are like sisters. So, when Julie falls for Kristin's brother, George, it seems to be the perfect romance. But both soon realize that escaping the past takes more than love - and can lead to fatal consequences.

programme.title: American Monster: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Coming home from church, a local preacher finds his wife brutally stabbed and beaten, the apparent victim of a home invasion. His alibi is sound, as are their two grown sons. However, several details just don't add up. The truth shocks everyone.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Shooting Phoenix
programme.desc: A monster stalks the summer streets of Phoenix in 2005. With never-before-seen footage, we get a glimpse into the killer's life and how he's able to hide in plain sight. Can police catch him before he strikes again?

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in Store
programme.desc: Jerry Barker falls hard for Rebecca after the death of his first wife-and together they open a general store. But the shelf-life on their happiness is short-lived—and when it comes to murder, practice doesn't make perfect.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Unholy Trinity
programme.desc: Amanda and Tonch Weldon seem like the quintessential Iowa farming couple. But behind closed doors, their cravings are quite kinky. Their secret swinging lifestyle works well for years… Until one day a deadly love triangle emerges.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: 20-year-old Steve Bryant thinks he's found his calling among the peaceful, robe-wearing Hare Krishna community. But when he defies a despotic renegade guru, Bryant learns that ultimate devotion has a dark and deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: The War Within
programme.desc: A trusting teenager has no idea that her first love is part of a dangerous militia group with terrifying plans to kill.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: American Monster: It Was All of Them
programme.desc: The Futos are a close-knit family of five who film their lives over many decades. But when four of them are found brutally murdered, the investigation into the slayings will uncover a terrible truth and a family secret that has laid buried for decades.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Still Haunts Me
programme.desc: An extended interview with Gwen Bailey, who married Norman Starnes thinking she landed the most eligible bachelor in town. Years later, she discovered she never really knew him at all, but by then, she was already his unwilling accomplice.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Punch List
programme.desc: While Mark is on the road drumming up new business, the guys pick off a list of chores on the Boneyard, including stacking the Hamlin cabin. Meanwhile, Mark checks out the most incredible hand-hewn timber-frame barn he's ever seen.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Part of the Family
programme.desc: The guys head to Bronston, Kentucky, to check out a 150-year-old, double-pen farmhouse built by their client's great-grandfather. She hopes to preserve her pioneer heritage, so the crew takes care to save every log possible.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mark Finds His Dream Home Barn
programme.desc: After years of searching, Mark Bowe has found the barn he wants to turn into his own home. The guys work carefully to take apart the enormous bank barn without breaking any of the beams. Mark visits a nearby barn that has been transformed for weddings.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Egg Files
programme.desc: Crack the mysterious egg case and pursue a higher understanding of this amazing ovoid.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Flat Is Beautiful II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown gives the 'reload' treatment to a show about flattened meat dishes, including a new chicken piccata and a chicken Kiev that's actually a schnitzel.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Christensen
programme.desc: Raleigh-based Chef Ashley Christensen battles Iron Chef Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Garces vs. Forgione
programme.desc: In this first round of the Iron Chef America Tournament of Champions, Iron Chefs Jose Garces and Marc Forgione face off in Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Zakarian vs. Guarnaschelli
programme.desc: In this first round of the Iron Chef America Tournament of Champions, Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Garces vs. Morimoto
programme.desc: Iron Chef Masaharu Morimoto battles the Iron Chef Jose Garces.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Zakarian vs. Symon
programme.desc: Chef Geoffrey Zakarian battles Chef Michael Symon. The judges for this battle are Ree Drummond, Aaron Sanchez, and Trisha Yearwood.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Finale
programme.desc: In this final round of the Iron Chef America Tournament of Champions, Iron Chefs Jose Garces and Michael Symon battle in Kitchen Stadium. Judges Donatella Arpaia, Bobby Flay and Karine Bakhoum will crown one Grand Champion.
