programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows that you just can't beat authentic Southern cooking. Whether it's hearty and savory breakfasts, traditional and delicious low-country cuisine or sweet desserts, it’s a full day of your favorite Southern staples.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Campus Cravings
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson might miss college football and parties, but most importantly, he misses the food. No matter the time, day or night, you can always find some of the best bites around to satisfy your campus cravings.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Memphis
programme.desc: From sweet deals on steak dinners at The Butchershop, to the guilty pleasure of indulgent surf and turf at Iris, Memphis is home to some of the best food you'll ever eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the seafood lover's paradise of North Carolina's Outer Banks region. The unique location serves up dishes like blue crab, Hatteras clam chowder, baked oysters and other mouthwatering feasts born of the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of Aruba, where the climate is as warm as the people. He indulges in local favorites like hearty Dutch pea soup, comforting yet elegant seafood cazuela and sweet, buttery cashew cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini
programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: Henry Danger: I Know Your Secret
programme.desc: Henry gets a series of mysterious notes from someone and worries that this person may know his secret identity.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Message Chair
programme.desc: After saving a chair store from danger the owner gives them a free chair of their choice, and they pick a massage chair. Fights ensue when everyone wants to sit in the massage chair.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Cave the Date
programme.desc: Henry and the gang set up an underground restaurant for Charlotte's dinner with Jack Swagger. Some unwanted guests crash the party when they heat Jack Swagger is in town.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Rumblr
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger set up profiles on a match-making app for heroes and villains. The two of them then set up a double-fight with new villains.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Two Pipers
programme.desc: Henry gets an unexpected visitor claiming to be from the future. When a boy-robot killing machine steps onto the scene, The Gang must find a way to save everyone from an apocalyptic future.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Escape Room
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain get trapped inside an escape room with two new kids who are strangely good and solving the puzzles.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Captain Drex
programme.desc: Kid Danger may be the only one who can save Captain Man from Drex and an army of cavemen.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Quietest Day Ever/ Bully Bromance Breakup
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create ninja outfits that make themselves invisible to anyone not wearing one.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Fremergency Fronfract / The Boy Wander
programme.desc: When Wander picks up a loopy Lord Hater from the dentist, he spends the day showing Hater how much fun being good can be. Then, Wander heroically faces a ridiculous villain from his past who no one takes seriously.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Bounty / The Ball
programme.desc: Hater hires a bunch of bounty hunters to capture Wander but Peepers tries to thwart them so he can have all the glory to himself.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Date/The Buddies
programme.desc: When Lord Hater gets stood up on a date, Wander convinces Sylvia to endure a date with Hater in order save the planet from Hater’s wrath. Then, Lord Hater is forced to play the role of Wander’s friend when he is trapped on his own prison planet.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Greatest/ The Egg
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia try to soften the heart of Lord Hater’s new giant flying battle beast by reuniting it with its lost egg.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Cool Guy/ The Catastrophe
programme.desc: Lord Hater ditches Peepers to party with Emperor Awesome. Then, Sylvia discovers Wander's new obsession with funny cat videos is part of a more fiendish viral plot.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Search for Captain Time/ The Heebie Jeebies
programme.desc: Lord Hater accidentally recruits a bloodthirsty alien hunter to help him find his missing pet. Wander and Sylvia search a creepy forest planet for a mystical power.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Return to the Spider: Verse - Part One
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Kid Arachnid travel to alternate dimensions in order to gather the shards from the broken Siege Perilous.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Return to the Spider: Verse - Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Miles, tracking the missing pieces of the Siege Perilous, travel to a tropical pirate dimension, where they meet Web Beard, the Spider-Pirate.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Return to the Spider: Verse - Part Three
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Kid Arachnid arrive in the Noir Universe where they have to prevent Mr. Negative from using the Siege Perilous to drain all the life and color out of the world.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Return to the Spider: Verse - Part Four
programme.desc: Spider-Man, having collected all of the shards of the Siege Perilous, returns to Miles Morales’ universe and finally confronts Wolf Spider.

programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Webby sets out to prove to a homesick Penumbra that Earth can be a lot of fun by riding Glomgold's newest gift to Duckburg, the suspicious Flintferris Glomwheel.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: When a mysterious magic thief arrives in Duckburg, Lena must confront her past and team with her treacherous aunt, Magica.

programme.desc: In an attempt to capture ruthless cop killers, an NYPD detective shuts down the city's bridges.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Prince: The End
programme.desc: Uncovering the secret struggles the music genius faced, from Prince's early years to the final days leading up to his shocking death.

programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz are pulling out all the stops to completely rebuild the Super Six for a client, and Heavy D faces a challenge when his neighbour asks him to turn a 5-ton military truck into a snow-demolishing plow.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast and Furious Fairmont
programme.desc: An ugly 1978 Ford Fairmont is turned into a cool, mirrored drift car. Richard flips a rare 1967 Corvette Stingray.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: No Bull Bonneville
programme.desc: Once again, Richard and Aaron stall the crazy, roadtripping Aussies with Texas hospitality while the crew races to finish a 59 Bonneville they were given only 72 hrs to fix up. To get some more cash for the job, Richard picks up two mini cars from a nest.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped Cabriolet and 'Vette Rescue
programme.desc: The crew helps a widow by buying her husband's Ford '32 Cabriolet and many hot rod projects. They rescue an heirloom '62 Corvette from a garage falling down around it, but not all the family is pleased Richard has it. Richard makes a big announcement.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Killer COPO Camaro
programme.desc: Richard gets his hands dirty building a $100,000 2013 COPO Camaro from the wheels up on the VIP assembly line. Aaron ignores his request to work on a newly arrived 1930 Model A and builds his own dream vehicle instead while the Monkeys tackle the A.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Troll's Choice Rolls-Royce
programme.desc: When Richard 'accidentally' buys $92K worth of cars at an auction, his bookkeeper sister insists he flip all five cars in one week. Some go more easily and profitably than others but it's a weirdly built Rolls Royce that even Aaron has a hard time fixing.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mustang Mania
programme.desc: Aaron chances the wrath of the Big Monkey when he overrides Richard's instructions on a Mustang Fastback. After picking up a 'Holy Grail' Boss 429 Mustang in Minnesota, Richard questions Dennis' decision to buy a rustbucket Jaguar E-Class buried in snow.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Jacked-Up Jeep
programme.desc: Aaron and the Gas Monkey crew overhaul a Jeep in 24 hours to surprise a friend. Richard flips a funky gull-winged Bricklin. Daphne convinces a reluctant Richard to hire his nephew. Dennis and Richard argue over how best to sell their COPO Camaros.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Worst Wrecks: Detroit, Crash City
programme.desc: The OKC reflects on one of the worst crashes in Street Outlaws history: the fateful night when Chief raced Brian 'Chucky' Davis.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Worst Wrecks: Post-Traumatic Racing
programme.desc: The 405 returns for intense list racing while Big Chief struggles with PTSD following his horrendous crash.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Worst Wrecks: End of Days
programme.desc: The OKC crew reveals the dangers of their sport by reliving a horrifying crash that caused a racer to believe his days behind the wheel were over.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Love Me or Leave Me
programme.desc: Jovi and Yara head to Vegas. Natalie flees Sequim. Brandon and Julia move up the wedding. Stephanie and Harris contemplate the future. Rebecca feels lost before her wedding. Hazel comes out to her family and enjoys her bachelorette party. Amira panics.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Second Guessing
programme.desc: The 90 days are up for the Americans and their foreign fiancés, and they must marry or go back home. Mike and Natalie have only 24 hours to make their decision. In Vegas, Jovi gets pre-wedding jitters.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: First Comes Love...
programme.desc: Jovi and Elvis wait for Yara at the altar. It's day 90 for Mike and Natalie. Amira reaches her breaking point with Andrew. Stephanie is ready to start over with Harris. Then, Jovi and Yara welcome their new baby.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Can I Light You Up?
programme.desc: Kody finally returns to Janelle's house, but the larger family conflict over COVID-19 rules continues to grow. Then, it's Kody and Meri's 30th anniversary, and Kody shows no interest in rekindling a romance, despite Meri's intense interest.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: Tosha makes a bold confession to her mom. Despite their family's concern, the Merrifields forge ahead with their plans for potential sister wife Roberta. Vanessa and Kaleh clash over their differences. The Snowdens' new girlfriend reveals a secret.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: First Comes Love...
programme.desc: Jovi and Elvis wait for Yara at the altar. It's day 90 for Mike and Natalie. Amira reaches her breaking point with Andrew. Stephanie is ready to start over with Harris. Then, Jovi and Yara welcome their new baby.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Can I Light You Up?
programme.desc: Kody finally returns to Janelle's house, but the larger family conflict over COVID-19 rules continues to grow. Then, it's Kody and Meri's 30th anniversary, and Kody shows no interest in rekindling a romance, despite Meri's intense interest.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: Tosha makes a bold confession to her mom. Despite their family's concern, the Merrifields forge ahead with their plans for potential sister wife Roberta. Vanessa and Kaleh clash over their differences. The Snowdens' new girlfriend reveals a secret.

programme.title: Unexpected: Ticking Clocks
programme.desc: McKayla is forced to choose sides when she must decide whom she wants in the delivery room. James learns some shocking facts about childbirth from his sister. The stresses of the newborn baby tear Lexus and her mother apart.

programme.title: Unexpected: What's in a Name
programme.desc: McKayla's baby's name is met with lots of tears. Shayden struggles with Kelsey's rules and Lexus feels her mom is pushing her away. Lilly gets more than she bargained for when she tries to induce labor. Caelen surprises McKayla with a bold proposition.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Snow-cation
programme.desc: It's a trip of firsts for the Quints as the family heads to Wyoming for a ski trip. As the Busbys prepare for Hazel's eye appointment, they fear the worst. Also, with a global crisis looming, Adam and Danielle wonder what waits for them at home.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Coronavirus Changes Everything
programme.desc: As the threat of coronavirus rises, the Busbys must deal with homeschooling their six daughters and juggling birthday plans amidst the crisis. Hazel's appointment is coming up, but the Busbys aren't sure if it will happen and what the outcome will be.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quints in Quarantine
programme.desc: As coronavirus takes hold, the Busbys must quarantine in their home. In this entirely self-shot episode, the family of eight celebrates birthdays and Easter, fights off cabin fever and tries to stay sane as they spend weeks on end cooped up together.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Escape from Quarantine
programme.desc: Local quarantine restrictions are lifted, and the Busbys are ready to salvage the rest of their summer! Things take a turn for the worse when they discover a huge issue lurking in the kitchen walls. Parker faces an old fear, and Dale surprises the family.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quints' Night Out
programme.desc: Blayke gets her big girl sleepover while the Quints invade Uncle Dale and Aunt Crystal's for the night. The kitchen renovation goes from bad to worse. The Busbys try to teach the girls to ride bikes. Hazel gets a surprise visit from her boyfriend, Graham.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in a Shoe
programme.desc: A new mother who's still nursing can't figure out why she can't lose her baby weight only to learn the real reason. Meanwhile, a mother of two has her tubes tied when years later she gets a very unexpected surprise.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Vasectomy Baby
programme.desc: After a negative pregnancy test, Monique is in shock when she delivers a baby in her bathroom. Afraid that there's no time to wait for an ambulance, she gets in her car and drives her newborn to the hospital herself.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Twin Baby Surprise
programme.desc: When Jasmine is taken to the hospital with abdominal cramps, she is stunned to learn she's in labour with a breech baby and shocked that there's a twin.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Equipped with an IUD after her daughter, Anna is surprised to give birth again at home.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Shock of My Life
programme.desc: A teacher's aid fails to recognize the signs of pregnancy, and mistakes labour pains as menstrual cramps.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on the Job
programme.desc: Debilitating stomach pains overwhelm Dana, and she is stunned when paramedics arrive in time to deliver a baby at her work's parking lot.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mutt-erial Girl
programme.desc: In Riverside, Brandi saves a loose pooch from oncoming traffic; Darrell's locker confirms his Magic Bullet Theory; while Kenny's unit serves up a shiny score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Me, Myself and Ivy

programme.desc: State of the art forensics, dogged police work, and some extraordinary turns of events lead police to a gruesome murder scene, the medical room of a ball bearings factory.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Olympic Bomber
programme.desc: There is evidence that ties the 1996 Summer Olympic bombings to several others.

programme.desc: An adventurous child with a love for animals, Courtney dreamed of growing up to be a veterinarian. Tragically, when she was just seven years old, her best friend died in a drowning accident and Courtney was never the same.

programme.title: Intervention: Tristan
programme.desc: After a series of tragic losses, Tristan moved to Las Vegas to pursue a career in construction, only to spiral out of control and become an alcoholic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part Two)
programme.desc: After receiving some troubling news about Kanye while in New York for the Angel Ball, Kim rushes home to his aid. Meanwhile, Kendall worries that a bad review could jeopardize her modeling career, and Khloé clashes with Malika over priorities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex Files
programme.desc: After an explosive fight between Rob and Chyna, the sisters feel like it is their duty to protect their brother from a toxic relationship. Meanwhile, Kris tries to rebuild her relationship with Cait, but is blindsided by some hurtful allegations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Scott is devastated when he hears a rumor that Kourtney is hooking up with another guy and spirals back into old vices. After taking some personal time following the robbery, Kim is back to work but is reluctant to be in the public eye anymore.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part One
programme.desc: After Kim busts Scott with a girl in Dubai, the family is surprised Kourtney allowed him on the family trip to Costa Rica. The sisters discover Scott has invited yet another girl to join him in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part Two
programme.desc: After the family confronts Scott about his unwelcome guest in Costa Rica, Kourtney must inform him that he's ruined any chance of them getting back together. Meanwhile, Khloé is fed up with her family's bad attitude.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Diva Tea: Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel
programme.desc: Lisa throws a proper English Tea with some very improper conversation as Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel share tales of red carpet underwear fails, one-night stands, and a famous baby daddy!

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Find out what was real and what wasn’t on some of reality TV’s first hit shows, when stars like Richard Hatch ('Survivor') and Julie Chen ('Big Brother') tell all. Andy Cohen reunites four original cast members of 'The Real World'; secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: College Bootcamp
programme.desc: When Chase pays a stranger to change his flat tire, Todd and Julie realize that they have sheltered their kids, and only have a few months left to teach them the basics of life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Julie is excited to start her new food blog but when no one 'likes' her page, she and Todd go on a food journey, which takes them from fine French cuisine to foraging for their own food.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: Grayson decides he wants to be a real city slicker for his 9th birthday, and persuades his entire family to stay overnight at a working dude ranch, where they will test how country the Chrisleys really are.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross Country Comfort Food
programme.desc: Guy is finding great food from the ski slopes to the sea. In Miami, a law student who has traded in his suit for a chef coat is making all kinds of comfort food, from spicy ox tail to big ragu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Go

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Round One Continues

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Final Eight Revealed

programme.desc: In Talkeetna, Alaska, the three teams scavenge for a local favorite, chaga mushrooms. Tyler Florence is forced to give some harsh feedback and issues a challenge to help them turn things around as elimination decides the final two teams for the finale.

programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls

programme.title: Lone Star Law: No License to Kill
programme.desc: Foolhardy speedsters run afoul of wardens on a nighttime stakeout mission. Game Warden Mike Boone investigates reckless gunfire endangering life and property, and Game Warden Chelsea Bailey crosses paths with a wanted man during a routine safety check.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back in the Wild
programme.desc: Anglers are out all over Texas. In Houston County, a Game Warden returns after a life-threatening injury. Along the coast, fishermen get caught with too many sharks. A protected turtle gets relocated and anglers on the Gulf learn how to tag fish.

programme.desc: After his daughter is killed in a terrorist blast, a grieving father becomes convinced that a government official is withholding information that could lead him to her killers, forcing him to use extreme and violent measures to get the information.

programme.title: Home Town: An Old Familiar Place
programme.desc: After being away for 30 years, a woman dreams of retiring in the small town where she has fond memories of her childhood. With her all-in budget of $120,000, Erin designs an elegant home while Ben creates some unique builds including a laundry shoot.

programme.title: Home Town: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A photographer and close friend of the Napiers is looking for a traditional home with a touch of modern style. After deciding on a classic mansion in need of a complete makeover, Ben and Erin transform the tired house into a show-stopping home.

programme.title: Home Town: Design for Living
programme.desc: An interior designer wants to buy a starter home in Laurel, and Ben and Erin are up for the challenge. Whether she picks the quaint cottage or the former rental, Erin is excited to flex her design muscles with a boho/ mid-modern style her colleague loves.

programme.title: Home Town: Thanks for the Memories
programme.desc: With their daughters leaving the nest, a couple must decide between renovating their high-maintenance home or moving into a clean slate. Ben and Erin aim to mark everything off their wish list and save Laurel's first family of hospitality's reputation.

programme.title: Home Town: Memory Lane: A House With History
programme.desc: Jay and Rhonda are professors interested in historic preservation, and now they're looking for an old home of their own. Erin and Ben revive a 1920s craftsman cottage that stays true to its character, including original woodwork.

programme.title: Home Town: A Laurel Hug
programme.desc: A woman is moving back to Laurel to be close to family after the sudden passing of her husband. Ben and Erin thoughtfully bring their design to life and create a gorgeous, sun-filled home as a soft landing to help get her through this difficult time.

programme.title: Home Town: A Second Chance
programme.desc: When a tornado rips through Laurel, the home Ben and Erin renovated for Nancy and Richard T Jones is severely damaged. They vow to not only restore it to its pre-tornado condition, but to re-imagine it.

programme.title: Home Town: Big Renovation in a Small Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin Napier love their small town of Laurel, Mississippi. They're passionate about making their town flourish like it did years ago. The best way they know how is to make Laurel a friendly and welcoming place to live.

programme.title: Home Town: A House With History
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house that's rich in character and small town charm.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs help a woman turn her historic 1905 home into a beautiful Victorian retreat. But they have their work cut out for them with its shoddy, unfinished contracting work throughout the living room, kitchen, master bedroom and back porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Dreary Home Gets Bright Update
programme.desc: A baking aficionado and her husband want to convert their dark, oddly constructed home into a bright and welcoming space for them and their kids.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Nightmare Cabin to Family Dream Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny modernize a couple's rundown log cabin while keeping its historic integrity intact. The top-to-bottom transformation includes new amenities like a custom live-edge bar, outdoor shower and a brand-new porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Rustic Cabin to Contemporary Retreat
programme.desc: A family that survived a devastating house fire buys a home on a lake. However, the lack of space doesn’t fit their needs, so they ask Dave and Jenny to overhaul the rustic cabin.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Family House with History
programme.desc: A couple with a 19th-century home want it updated to fit their lifestyle. Dave and Jenny renovate the space while preserving its historic charm.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Boring House Turns Into a Boho-Chic Rental
programme.desc: Tired of their tight quarters in New Jersey, two best friends were happy to be transferred back to Bentonville, Arkansas, for work. Luckily, Dave and Jenny Marrs have a rental property that is ready to be custom-renovated with cool Caribbean style.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: Who Wants to Buy a Dream Home
programme.desc: Everyone wants to be a millionaire, but not everyone is game enough to go on national television to win it. Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen takes a game-show winner and his fiancée on a tour of future family homes with room for her "boudoir" and his "dudoir."

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Home on the Cape
programme.desc: A mother and her two grown daughters find out how far their $1 million lottery win will take them in Cape Cod, Massachusetts.

programme.desc: The remake of the cult classic, a shy teenage girl tries to befriend a popular cheerleader at her school to make herself more popular. When the cheerleader rebuffs her friendship, the embarrassment fuels a passion for revenge and murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Cheerleader
programme.desc: A high school senior tries to shed her good girl persona and get noticed by boys when she joins the cheerleading squad.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Cheerleader Coach
programme.desc: A girl joins the cheer squad and the assistant coach offers private lessons-- but she has her sights set on the girl's father, and will stop at nothing to get what she wants.

programme.title: Movie: Cheerleader Nightmare
programme.desc: While flying a drone with the AV club, a teenager accidentally spies her boyfriend cheating on her with the school's head cheerleader. But when the cheerleader turns up murdered, the boyfriend becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns

programme.title: Devil's Road: The True Story of Ed and Lorraine Warren: Part 2

programme.title: Amityville Horror House
programme.desc: Never-before-seen archive reveals frightening, new secrets from George and Kathy Lutz's brief stay in one of America's most wonderous haunts the Amityville Horror house.

programme.desc: Jason Hawes breaks down the top ten most terrifying places on earth in this spine-chilling countdown.

programme.desc: The naked guests distract the crew as they try to stay focused on their jobs. As Hannah and Bobby hash out their differences, Lauren struggles as the tension mounts between her and Bobby. Meanwhile, Bugsby deals with the loss of her grandmother.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry Over Cut Onions

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Onions, Mo' Problems

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Flirting With Danger
programme.desc: When a hot bachelor charters the Sirocco, a smitten Hannah attempts to keep it professional. Wes struggles with his growing feelings for Malia as fireworks ignite between her and Adam. Bugsy and Hannah's relationship gets further strained.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: iCloudy With a Chance of Secrets

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Kissing Up

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Dubrovnik Wedgie

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Swing Shift

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Shot and a Shave
programme.desc: Rick is offered some of the craziest items ever to enter the store, from a quilt made of celebrity's signatures to an 1845 Harpers Ferry musket.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chopper Gamble
programme.desc: The guys are given the opportunity to purchase something they have never purchased before, a helicopter.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pinball Wizards
programme.desc: The guys have a chance to buy a vintage pinball machine but it is in need some serious repairs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fork It Over
programme.desc: The crew checks out a fork from the wreckage of the Hindenburg.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Shekel and Hyde
programme.desc: The guys try to make a deal for a 2,000-year-old Shekel of Tyre, the same type of coin given to Judas to betray Christ. Then, Rick and the Old Man check out a pair of engraved Colt pistols from the 1860s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Alternative artwork for 'Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band' rocks into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The guys check out a pair of punching bags owned by Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chum-Sake
programme.desc: The guys check out an entire sheet of test notes made when the U.S. Mint was testing a new printing press. Then, Corey and Chumlee have to duck and cover when some poleaxes swing into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: I Herd That
programme.desc: An 1870s Sharps buffalo rifle; an aphorism signed by Mark Twain; Victorian pickle castors.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: On a Mission to Pawn
programme.desc: The guys check out a replica of the iconic Blues Mobile from the movie 'The Blues Brothers.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mad Deals
programme.desc: Rick sets his sights on a 1969 Triumph Motorcycle. Then, the first ever issue of Mad Comics illustrates its way into the shop. Later, Cory locks and loads when a 1800s Parker Brothers shotgun fires in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Halen
programme.desc: A set of 1814 naval history books from John Adam's personal library sails into the shop. An electronic cigar box guitar signed by the legendary frontman Sammy Hager rocks in. Then, a 1901 coin sorter comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Double Your Pawn
programme.desc: Harry Carey's collection of nearly 200 celebrity autographs; a 1900s Wrigley Gum vending machine; a measuring device known as a railroad equilibristat; a 1960s Jimmy Jet toy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Oh Holy Pawn
programme.desc: Rick gets the opportunity to purchase a page from the Gutenberg Bible, the first printed book. Corey finds a rare six-sheet movie poster from the classic 'Ziegfeld Follies.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wound Up Rick
programme.desc: An autograph Led Zeppelin album; an antique whistle collection; a Doonesbury cartoon pencils; a self-winding clock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Money to Pawn
programme.desc: Don't get fooled at the pawn shop when a seller hands Chumlee a thirty dollar bill. Will this curious cash have Chum reaching for his wallet to buy it or will it turn out to be a costly currency that's not worth making a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ultimate Fighting Pawn
programme.desc: An antique high wheel bike captivates Rick. Chum sells one of Rick's beloved Japanese katanas to UFC President Dana White. Rick heads out to look at a beautifully-restored grand piano from the 1800s. An original Walkman cassette player stops by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Highly Explosive Pawn
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck when a British Navy gunpowder bucket blasts into the shop and a seller approaches the Pawn Stars to present them with a past prop from 'Back to the Future, Part II.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: He Shoots, He Pawns
programme.desc: Rick plays ball with Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for some of his most prized memorabilia. Then, Chumlee goes for bronze with a bust of Michelangelo's Pieta. Plus, Rick gets some correspondence from General George Armstrong Custer.

programme.title: Movie: Destination Moon
programme.desc: A former Air Force general and an industrial mogul build a spaceship to go to the moon.

programme.title: Movie: East of Eden
programme.desc: The emotionally volatile son of a lettuce farmer searches for approval from his family.

programme.title: Movie: Easter Parade
programme.desc: A dancing couple decided to go their own way and take on new partners. After a while one couple is very successful and a dance company is interested, the male decides not to accept since his ex-partner is at the company.

programme.title: Movie: The Egg and I
programme.desc: A Manhattan-dwelling couple struggles to adapt to the rigors of rural life.

programme.title: Movie: The Enchanted Cottage
programme.desc: A homely girl and a scarred war veteran marry out of desperation and fall in love.

programme.title: Movie: The End of the Affair
programme.desc: A writer uncovers a secret when he hires a private investigator to follow his ex-mistress.

programme.title: Movie: The Entertainer
programme.desc: A third-rate performer uses liquor and women to escape the pressures of changing times.

programme.title: Movie: Eskimo
programme.desc: Bad weather complicates the adventures of a journeying Eskimo family.

programme.title: Movie: Executive Suite
programme.desc: A furniture-store executive's sudden death results in a fierce power struggle between his five vice-presidents who each want to replace him.

programme.title: Movie: Experiment Perilous
programme.desc: When a psychiatrist falls in love with a patient, he finds himself involved with murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Facts of Life
programme.desc: A married man falls in love with a married woman on vacation when they become bored with their respective marriages.

programme.title: Movie: The Fallen Idol
programme.desc: A young boy idolizes a household servant who is suspected of murdering his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Far From the Madding Crowd
programme.desc: Loved by three men, an heiress almost loses her chance at happiness.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Chipocalypse Now
programme.desc: Chip Whistler tears down the buildings around the Greens' house to build a new Wholesome Foods store.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rent Control/ Pool's Gold
programme.desc: When Gloria's parents visit, she ropes the Greens into escalating lies about her success. Then, Cricket goes on a quest to find the best pool in Big City.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Resolution/ Winter Greens
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, Cricket insists on helping Gloria complete her resolution of approaching her long-time crush, Kevin. Cricket and Remy challenge Vasquez to a snowball fight, while Tilly creates a snowperson.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Mages and Mazes/ Okay Karaoke
programme.desc: The kids play a role-playing game at Remy's but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Date Night/ The Room
programme.desc: Bill chaperones Cricket and Gabriella's first date. Then, Tilly closes up Cricket's secret escape hole in their room, sparking a conflict that leads them to splitting the room down the middle.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Bleeped/ Sellouts
programme.desc: Cricket is amused by a new socially unacceptable word in his big city world and tempts fate by repeating it. Then, the Greens try new methods to improve sales at their produce stand.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fast Foodie/ Spaghetti Theory
programme.desc: When a Burger Clown franchise opens next door, Cricket tries to prove to Bill that he can eat fast food for every meal with no ill effects. Then, Tilly and Cricket debate whether the lives of people in Big City are intertwined.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Ding Dongers/ Animation Abomination
programme.desc: Remy uses Cricket's antics to gain views and likes on a new video-sharing app. Then, When Cricket and Tilly learn that Gloria has an internship at the animation studio that produces their favorite cartoon, they beg her to bring them for a visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: The Van/ Bat Girl
programme.desc: Gramma and Cricket are upset that an ugly van has been parked in front of their house for what seems like forever. Then, Nancy joins Cricket and Tilly's community center little league team.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cousin Jilly/ Gloria's Cafe
programme.desc: Tilly revives 'Cousin Jilly,' an alter-ego she created to entertain Cricket when they were younger. Gloria opens a secret café in the former Big Coffee space without permission.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Fresh Off the Note
programme.desc: When Booker suspects that Nia's friend, Olivia, has a crush on him, he decides to put a 'Let's be friends' note in her locker, but accidentally puts it in Tess' locker.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: He's All That
programme.desc: When Harry tells Sydney he is moving back to Portland permanently, she struggles with the idea of having a long distance relationship.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The Bennett-Blatts take part in a charity sporting event to raise money for the local kids club.

programme.title: Jessie: Katch Kipling
programme.desc: When Mrs. Kipling becomes a celebrity, it puts a strain on her relationship with Ravi. Meanwhile, Bertram preps Emma for an audition and Zuri tries to be more independent.

programme.title: Jessie: The Fear in Our Stars
programme.desc: Jessie has to relearn all the 'special skills' she listed on her resume for a commercial that she booked. Meanwhile, Ravi convinces Luke that a meteor is headed towards Earth.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie Goes to Hollywood
programme.desc: When Christina Ross returns home, Jessie heads to L.A. for a role in a movie. When the kids realize that they still need her, however, they follow Jessie to Hollywood.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny
programme.desc: Jessie accepts a job as a nanny and moves in with the Ross family: Christina, a former supermodel turned business mogul; Morgan, a famous movie director; their four kids Emma, Ravi, Luke and Zuri and their beloved Asian water monitor lizard.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Band-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv rallies together a band, The Dream, to compete in the upcoming Stevens Point Battle of the Bands contest. Joey and Artie form a band too, but they can't seem to agree on anything.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cook-A-Rooney
programme.desc: To raise her grade in Mr. Clodfelter's home economics class, Maddie must win the Plate Off and defeat the class master chef, Artie. Meanwhile, Joey convinces Pete to sponsor his made-up clubs at school.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Campers & Complications
programme.desc: When Ally's old summer camp friend Elliott comes to town to pay a visit, he and Ally spend a lot of time catching up and reminiscing about the past. Though Austin is now dating Kira, he suddenly finds himself jealous of Ally's friendship with Elliott.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Chapters & Choices
programme.desc: When Ally's mom comes home to host a book release party, Ally works up the courage to finally conquer her stage fright and performs a duet with Austin at the event.

programme.title: Jessie: 101 Lizards
programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie
programme.desc: Jessie is concerned that Tony has become controlling, clingy and insecure in their relationship. After Tony invites her out for a 'very special night' to meet his parents, she is terrified that he is going to propose.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Hearthunter (The Battle of the Miraculous, Part 1)
programme.desc: Ladybug and Cat Noir face the Bourgeois couple. Now Hearthunter, a Cerberus with two heads, they devour all the love in Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Miracle Queen (The Battle of the Miraculous, Part 2)
programme.desc: Hawk Moth akumatizes Chloe into Miracle Queen to help her take control of all the Miraculous wearers.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Bad Little Dragon
programme.desc: After Sofia and Vivian find an adorable baby dragon in the woods, they discover he's not as innocent as he first appears.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Her Royal Spyness
programme.desc: Amber and Sofia learn an important lesson about not spying on others after a magic telescope deceives them into thinking that their mother is in danger.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The Heelers play a game of 'Bus'. Mum and Bluey play 'Mum School' where Mum teaches Bluey how to corral her rowdy kids. Bingo decides she’s too tired to walk and needs a piggyback.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Far Far From Home / Toy Trouble
programme.desc: Freddy can’t fall asleep on their first overnight delivery and worries that he won’t get the rest he needs! Pip and Freddy show Mia the joys of giving away her old toys.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Surfin' Birds/ Grandpa's Great Adventure
programme.desc: Freddy enters a surf contest to win baby Sandy the top prize! Retired T.O.T.S. flier Grandpa Hank joins Pip and Freddy to deliver his grand-stork.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Bluey: Easter/ Barky Boats/ Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Princess Fragrance
programme.desc: The akumatized Princess Fragrance causes mayhem with her magic perfume, going as far as kidnapping a visiting Prince.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Gamer
programme.desc: Adrien and Max enter a tournament for the videogame, Ultimate Robot Strike. After losing a challenge, Max gets akumatized into Gamer and unleashes a giant robot on Paris. Ladybug and Cat Noir are faced with a real-life video game.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Two
programme.desc: While exploring an Italian island, the Ross family's tour guide tells a story about Jessie's necklace, and how its curse brings anyone who wears it bad luck in love.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Three
programme.desc: Jessie abruptly ends the Ross family vacation because the kids are constantly fighting. They wind up in a pickle when they find the yacht the next morning floating in the middle of the sea with no captain or crew in sight.

programme.title: Jessie: Identity Thieves
programme.desc: When Luke becomes the brain of the family and Zuri the new trendy fashionista, Ravi and Emma feel their identities have been stolen.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: She was a dancer who married a dashing photographer. They seemed to have the picture-perfect life until the bone-chilling night she disappeared. In a case filled with twists, could the victim help solve her own murder?

programme.desc: The murder of a U.S. Airman leads Las Vegas investigators down a twisted path to one woman's offbeat oasis and ties to an unusual fan club.

programme.desc: It was called 'the trial of the century' and, decades after the polarizing case, questions remain. Hear answers and insights through interviews done over the years, rare footage and revealing conversations with key players who offer new details.

programme.title: NCIS: Enigma

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Matryoshka (Part 1)
programme.desc: In order to locate Arkady in Russia, the team goes undercover with his daughter, at a gala in Los Angeles to gain access to the Russian Consul General's computer.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Matryoshka (Part 2)
programme.desc: While they're in Russia, Callen, Sam and Anna craft a plan to break Anna's father and his CIA companion out of prison, Also, Special Agent G. Callen finally learns what the 'G' in his name stands for, and in L.A., Kensi and Deeks take Eric into the field.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Revenge Deferred
programme.desc: After extensive surveillance footage of Sam's family is found in Africa, Sam and Callen fly there to determine who is responsible and for what purpose. Also, Sam's family is moved from their home to safe house.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Exchange Rate
programme.desc: When a convicted Cuban spy escapes U.S. custody just before he is set to return to his country in a prisoner exchange, the team is shocked to learn that Anna helped him break out. Also, Deeks admits to Kensi that he thinks she is too messy.

programme.title: NCIS: Bete Noir
programme.desc: Ducky and his assistant Gerald are held hostage in the autopsy room of NCIS headquarters.

programme.title: NCIS: The Truth Is Out There
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the mysterious death of a sailor at an illegal night club.

programme.title: NCIS: UnSEALed

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: An NCIS agent has been murdered while investigating a case and the team's job is to find out what happened.

programme.title: NCIS: Missing

programme.title: NCIS: Split Decision
programme.desc: When a body of a murdered marine is found in the forest, the investigation leads to the local militia and a weapon deal gone wrong.

programme.title: Family Guy: Better Off Meg

programme.title: Family Guy: Girl, Internetted
programme.desc: When Meg suddenly becomes internet famous, she and an excited Peter work together to build her following and create content for her new image that revolves around unhealthy eating.

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray
programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trump Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins move to Washington D.C. where Peter is hired as the new White House Press Secretary.

programme.desc: When the guys volunteer to chaperone the high school prom, Quagmire hits it off with Courtney only to discover that she is his daughter. To his and the gang's surprise, Quagmire makes a serious effort to embrace parenting Courtney.

programme.title: Family Guy: Stand by Meg

programme.title: Family Guy: Yacht Rocky
programme.desc: When the brewery announces it will be firing one employee, Peter is nervous he will be the one let go. In order to calm his nerves, the family departs on a Yacht Rock cruise that doesn’t go as expected.

programme.title: Family Guy: Christmas Is Coming
programme.desc: When Meg takes Stewie to the mall to meet Santa, she has a surprising response. Meanwhile, Stewie is entirely scarred from the same experience and Brian tries to help him process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last of the Red Hat Mamas
programme.desc: Homer has an altercation with the Easter Bunny at the mayor's egg hunt, causing Marge to be shunned. Marge decides to join a woman's group called The Cheery Red Tomatoes, and agrees to help with an upcoming charity drive.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dark Knight Court

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: A Fish Called Tina

programme.desc: Tired of his colleagues constantly calling him a failure, Cyril agrees to help George Spelvin, a mysterious computer security expert, inject a virus into the ISIS mainframe so Cyril can defeat the virus and be seen as a hero.

programme.desc: The normal childish squabbles, sneaky backbiting and petty jealousies at ISIS are multiplied exponentially when a famous Hollywood actress, Rona Thorne, spends a week shadowing the agents as research for an upcoming role in a spy movie.

programme.desc: The legend of the lost city of Atlantis is one of history's greatest mysteries, and cutting-edge tech could bring it back to life; experts use modern engineering to reveal if it's possible to build a megacity underwater.

programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Exorcist Effect
programme.desc: A boy who can twist his head 180 degrees and face directly behind him resembles infamous accounts of demonic possession from horror films; experts use cutting-edge technology to find out what's giving him this extreme ability.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Mother's Lies
programme.desc: Years after her interview, Cindy Taylor revisits memories of her mother. When Cindy was a teen, the sudden death of her father shattered her world. Years later, she learned her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son is Damaged Goods

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A compassionate and outgoing woman's dream vacation turns into a deadly nightmare when she crosses paths with a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is found shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: Real Detective: Silence

programme.desc: When a beloved tennis star is shot in the back after attending a charity ball, Detective McFadden must determine who could have had it in for such a seemingly faultless golden boy.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Mother and Son

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deadly Riddle
programme.desc: A young girl's killer sends police a series of mysterious riddles and the key to catching him are hidden within the answers.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Enough is Enough

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Predators Among Us
programme.desc: Infamous sex abuse sports doctor attacked by angry parent; a gang member, a snitch and the F.B.I. collide; defiant defendant curses out judge; murderer taunts mother of two teenage sons; singing for a lenient sentence; prisoner meets his baby in court.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Run With It
programme.desc: At an aquarium, thieves snatch a shark from an open tank and make a break for it, with employees hot on their heels. And then, two inmates make a clever escape by hiding in garbage cans. They're all on the run and the hunt is on to find them.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Who Let the Dogs Out?
programme.desc: It looks like a Hollywood action film as a crazed female driver speeds through neighborhoods in an RV, with two dogs sitting on her lap. And then, a woman tosses a bag of newborn dogs into a dumpster, outraging an entire community.

programme.title: Dateline: Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: A top-ranking officer in the Canadian military pleads guilty to living a double life. Though he appeared to be a straight-laced commander, he also terrorized the woman of his town in a number of shocking predatory crimes, including murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: A top-ranking officer in the Canadian military pleads guilty to living a double life. Though he appeared to be a straight-laced commander, he also terrorized the woman of his town in a number of shocking predatory crimes, including murder.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Manhattan Murder Mystery

programme.title: Fatal Vows: To Kiss or to Kill

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.
